9249.headline: Galstead the Market Keeper was named among the gods.
9249.description: Galstead the Market Keeper is a benevolent creator of trade and exchange for Counting Creed of Galdrim. The god controls creation, prophecy, miracles, commandments, is marked by a road coin, and demands that followers weigh bargains in public. Its creation claim says it seated the first market at Peldun where bargains could be witnessed; its religious mandate says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public. Prophecies come through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a road coin appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny is nudged through rescue, repair, and mercy, miracles lean toward omen, and commandments lean toward hospitality.

9250.headline: Marara the Scale Mother was named among the gods.
9250.description: Marara the Scale Mother is a capricious messenger of trade and exchange for Counting Creed of Galdrim. The god controls destiny, commandments, is marked by a road coin, and demands that followers protect guest merchants. Its creation claim says it seated the first market at Peldun where bargains could be witnessed; its religious mandate says religion must witness fair exchange and protect guest merchants. Prophecies come through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a road coin appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny bends through reversals, bargains, and misread signs, miracles lean toward revelation, and commandments lean toward hospitality.

9251.headline: Corvale the Coin Witness was named among the gods.
9251.description: Corvale the Coin Witness is a mysterious messenger of trade and exchange for Counting Creed of Galdrim. The god controls prophecy, miracles, commandments, is marked by a market bell, and demands that followers weigh bargains in public. Its creation claim says it seated the first market at Peldun where bargains could be witnessed; its religious mandate says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public. Prophecies come through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a market bell appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny arrives through omens carried between places, miracles lean toward healing, and commandments lean toward hospitality.

9252.headline: Orton the Coin Witness was named among the gods.
9252.description: Orton the Coin Witness is a capricious messenger of trade and exchange for Counting Creed of Galdrim. The god controls destiny, miracles, commandments, religion, is marked by a market bell, and demands that followers weigh bargains in public. Its creation claim says it seated the first market at Peldun where bargains could be witnessed; its religious mandate says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public. Prophecies come through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a market bell appearing without hands, destiny works because destiny bends through reversals, bargains, and misread signs, miracles lean toward storm, and commandments lean toward hospitality.

9253.headline: Named Trial of Dorreach, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim entered sacred memory.
9253.description: Named Trial of Dorreach, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim is a heroic myth of trade and exchange first told in Peldun around Bram Valfield the 5th under Galstead the Market Keeper. The creation claim says Galstead the Market Keeper seated the first market at Peldun where bargains could be witnessed. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

9254.headline: Bound Oath of Ulstead, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim entered sacred memory.
9254.description: Bound Oath of Ulstead, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim is a covenant myth of trade and exchange first told in Peldun around Gorm Pelhelm under Marara the Scale Mother. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

9255.headline: Old Promise of Valdrim, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim entered sacred memory.
9255.description: Old Promise of Valdrim, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim is a covenant myth of trade and exchange first told in Peldun around Zane Galreach the 5th under Corvale the Coin Witness. Its symbols are tied to Ilvale River.

9256.headline: Current Speaker Bram Valfield the 5th was recognized.
9256.description: Bram Valfield the 5th became tidecaller for Counting Creed of Galdrim in Peldun, interpreting Named Trial of Dorreach, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim of Galstead the Market Keeper with signs read from Ilvale River.

9257.headline: Seer Gorm Pelhelm the 2nd was recognized.
9257.description: Gorm Pelhelm the 2nd became seer for Counting Creed of Galdrim in Peldun, interpreting Bound Oath of Ulstead, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim of Marara the Scale Mother with signs read from Ilvale River.

9258.headline: Bond Keeper Gorm Pelhelm was recognized.
9258.description: Gorm Pelhelm became oathbinder for Counting Creed of Galdrim in Peldun, interpreting Old Promise of Valdrim, kept by Counting Creed of Galdrim of Corvale the Coin Witness with signs read from Ilvale River.

9259.headline: Elara Forge Standard of Counting Creed of Galdrim became doctrine.
9259.description: Elara Forge Standard of Counting Creed of Galdrim is a doctrine of craft perfection under Galstead the Market Keeper teaching that a realm is judged by the honesty of its craft. Its honored virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public.

9260.headline: Noradia craft of Galstead the Market Keeper was given.
9260.description: Noradia craft of Galstead the Market Keeper is a craft commandment of Counting Creed of Galdrim given under Galstead the Market Keeper. It demands that followers weigh bargains in public; its virtue is mastery, and its taboo is passing flawed work as finished. This follows Galstead the Market Keeper's commandment style of hospitality.

9261.headline: Norreach Galmere Masterpiece became a kingdom goal.
9261.description: Norreach set a goal to build wonders at Peldun, shaped by Noradia craft of Galstead the Market Keeper.

9262.headline: Kira Valreach the 7th formed an ambition to serve a kingdom goal.
9262.description: Kira Valreach the 7th formed an ambition to serve a kingdom goal in Peldun, shaped by Norreach Galmere Masterpiece, Elara Forge Standard of Counting Creed of Galdrim, Current Speaker Bram Valfield the 5th, Counting Creed of Galdrim.

9263.headline: Ulmere Open Hand of Counting Creed of Galdrim became doctrine.
9263.description: Ulmere Open Hand of Counting Creed of Galdrim is a doctrine of fair exchange under Marara the Scale Mother teaching that peace rests on measured trade and witnessed bargains. Its honored virtue is fair dealing, and its taboo is cheating under a trusted seal. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and protect guest merchants.

It demands that followers protect guest merchants; its virtue is fair dealing, and its taboo is cheating under a trusted seal. This follows Marara the Scale Mother's commandment style of hospitality.

9265.headline: Norreach Galdrim Good Years became a kingdom goal.

9266.headline: Corin Ulmhaven the 2nd formed an ambition to serve a kingdom goal.

9267.headline: Armere Current Rite of Counting Creed of Galdrim became doctrine.
9267.description: Armere Current Rite of Counting Creed of Galdrim is a doctrine of river pilgrimage under Corvale the Coin Witness teaching that roads and rivers bind distant halls into one people. Its honored virtue is hospitality, and its taboo is turning away a lawful traveler. The religious mandate behind it says religion must witness fair exchange and weigh bargains in public.

It demands that followers weigh bargains in public; its virtue is hospitality, and its taboo is turning away a lawful traveler. This follows Corvale the Coin Witness's commandment style of hospitality.

9269.headline: Norreach Rivhelm Shared Rite became a kingdom goal.
9269.description: Norreach set a goal to spread belief at Peldun, shaped by Normere pilgrimage of Corvale the Coin Witness.

9270.headline: Neva Kelvale the 2nd formed an ambition to serve a kingdom goal.
9270.description: Neva Kelvale the 2nd formed an ambition to serve a kingdom goal in Peldun, shaped by Norreach Rivhelm Shared Rite, Armere Current Rite of Counting Creed of Galdrim, Bond Keeper Gorm Pelhelm, Counting Creed of Galdrim.

9271.headline: Prophecy of the Return at Peldun was spoken.
9271.description: Bram Valfield the 5th spoke Prophecy of the Return at Peldun, a prophecy of journey tied to Counting Creed of Galdrim and Galstead the Market Keeper, naming Peldun as its sign through through ledgers, road news, market bells, and a road coin appearing without hands.

9272.headline: Ordun sacred journey of Peldun was declared.
9272.description: Ordun sacred journey of Peldun is an active sacred journey destiny of Counting Creed of Galdrim under Galstead the Market Keeper, pressing Peldun toward a foretold role because destiny is nudged through rescue, repair, and mercy.

9273.headline: Norreach Valmere Promised Sign became a kingdom goal.
